info.name: Identity and Profile Management API
info.description:
Context-Dependent Identity Management System - Integration Tests

This collection mirrors the pytest integration tests in tests/integration/test_context_endpoints.py

Core Feature: Multi-context identity profiles based on Goffman's dramaturgical theory

item.name: 09 - Admin OAuth Client Management
item.description: Admin-only endpoints for managing OAuth clients. Requires admin privileges (is_admin=true in DB or email in ADMIN_USER_EMAILS env var).

body.raw:
{
  "client_id": "postman-test-client",
  "client_name": "Postman Test Client",
  "client_description": "Created via Postman integration test",
  "redirect_uris": ["https://postman-test.example.com/callback"],
  "allowed_scopes": ["profile:read:basic", "profile:read:email"],
  "is_confidential": true,
  "is_first_party": false
}

exec: pm.test("Response has client_id and secret", function () {
// Secret is returned ONLY on creation
pm.test("Response has correct client data", function () {
// Secret should NOT be in regular GET response
